strName.description: The code name of the condowner, as referred to in other files.

strNameShort.description:
Simplified name for generic category.
Used in tooltips and lists.

strNameFriendly.description: The human readable name of the condowner.

strLoot.description: Loot the condowner spawns with, reffers to entry within loot.json

strItemDef.description: The item definition, reffers to entry within items.json

strContainerCT.description: Condition trigger applied to anything contained in this CO. Refers to entry within condtrigs.json. (Per IVerifiable map / JsonCondOwner.GetVerifiables.)

strDesc.description: A longer description of the item. Present in inventory tooltips.

bSlotLocked.description: Controls whether the condowner is locked into the slot it inhabits

aInteractions.description: Interactions this condowner offers. Each refers to entry within interactions.json. (Per IVerifiable map / JsonCondOwner.GetVerifiables.)

aStartingConds.description: Conditions applied at spawn. Array of condition strings (Name=value*duration) — each name refers to entry within conditions.json

aStartingCondRules.description: CondRules attached at spawn. Each entry is 'RuleName=fModifier' — the name refers to entry within condrules.json; the fModifier (double, default 1.0) scales fMin/fMax thresholds at runtime. Per IVerifiable / JsonCondOwner.GetVerifiables.

aTickers.description: Tickers attached to this condowner (scheduled events / timers). Each refers to entry within tickers.json. (Per IVerifiable map / JsonCondOwner.GetVerifiables.)
